race.comment: LYCHEE GREEN TEA (6)  is a genuine type who brings narrow defeats from Edenhope and Echuca last time, where she led. Best figures measure up, and she's sure to run well. EMERALD COURT (5) is free running and will find this easier than her 3L defeat at Geelong. Led winning this grade comfortably at Colac prior, and she's a chance to bounce in this company. VALLENCOURT (4) has had two starts since switching from the Will Clarken yard in SA. Was beaten 2L back to this grade at Mt Gambier last time, and she's a third-up winner with more to give. Has a couple of key gear switches and will likely push forward. SHAME ON SUE (7) has been racing solidly without winning. Started favourite at Yarra Valley last time but lacked finishing dash over the longer sprint. The in-form Gordon rides today, and this is winnable if she brings her A-game. BELMASAI (1) has a low gate and can build on her tidy 52 win at Towong.
